title: Beaumont's Telephone Log
description: Corporal Beaumont's handwritten telephone log for the night of May 27th–28th shows every call in and out of the artillery dugout. At 04:50, there is an entry in Beaumont's precise hand: 'Lt. Farrow — outgoing — French liaison coordination — 4 minutes — language: French.' The call is logged to a French Army exchange number. Beaumont has circled this entry in pencil and written a single word in the margin: 'odd.'
